markers.title: Ethically Sourced
markers.description: Rooted in Italian artistry, Zelia Vance blends traditional techniques with the finest materials. Every piece is conflict-free and responsibly sourced.

markers.title: Jewelry's Meaning
markers.description: More than adornment, jewelry carries deep symbolism, influencing energy points and aura. Each design is infused with intention and balance.

markers.title: Spiritual Connection
markers.description: Pair text with an image to focus on your chosen product, collection, or blog post. Add details on availability, style, or even provide a review.
